title: Incorrect ORDER BY on an indexed JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(c String NOT NULL, d Float64 DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE INDEX t3cd ON t3(c, d);
SELECT b, y FROM t1 ARRAY JOIN t2 ON x=a ORDER BY b DESC, y ASC;
SELECT c, d FROM t3 WHERE d IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY clause not honored in indexed JOIN query
